title: VLANs, Trunks, STP, Aggregation, and MTU · Packet Lens: Net Svi Intervlan
summary: Segment a campus switch fabric for staff, voice, guest, management, and redundant uplinks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net svi intervlan increment in a verified switched campus configuration plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain switch virtual interfaces for management or Layer 3 gateways and the dependencies for an SVI to become operational.
Configure 802.1Q trunks, allowed VLANs, native VLAN, and voice VLAN behavior without mismatch or leakage.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
